data.name: Arcana: Heat and Cold. Season 3🔞
data.detailed_description:
Arcana: Heat and Cold is a wild mix of hentai, RPG Maker-like adventure (though the game wasn't made with RPG Maker), kinetic novel and occasional turn-based battles.

If you missed Spellbreaker and his funny companions, then I have great news for you. The new season is ready!

What awaits you?

Plot: a direct continuation of season 2!

Hentai: scenes in manga/comic style, featuring over 80 unique images and 160 pictures in total (drawn by a person).

Jokes, funny situations, adventures and fights.

And, of course,

No pixel hunting and grinding.

Additional details about the game:

-7 chapters. The total duration is about 5 hours.

- It's not a visual novel, but the text is a crucial part of the game.

- In the gallery, you can rewatch all the hentai scenes, without having to go through the rest of the game again.

I tried very hard, and I hope you will enjoy the new season! I would be glad to hear your opinion. And by the way, to make sure you don't miss the release, don't forget...

See you soon. Take care!

data.short_description: I've always dreamed of being a magician. But I was never able to learn magic. But how can I explain this to the cultists, elves, bandits, and everyone else who so desperately needs that "magic" within me? New adventures and hentai scenes await you in the long-awaited continuation of the 2nd season!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo 2.1 ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or newer
